sizing_rule.note: Position size determined by locating highest GHPR point on efficient frontier using Vince's geometric optimal framework. Specific base_risk_pct value not provided in excerpt—requires calculation of GHPR across portfolio candidates per Equation (7.05).

source_rule_text: Position size should be determined by locating the geometric optimal portfolio on the GHPR line, which represents the highest point of geometric growth, and can be found by converting AHPR and V values into GHPR calculations.
